name: Bong County (Liberia)
description: Orange field with the Liberian national flag as a canton in the upper hoist; a pink wave-shaped band along the lower edge represents the rolling country, with a white figural device in the fly half representing rural life.
history: Presented by President William V. S. Tubman on 29 November 1965 together with the flags of the other Liberian counties.

features.symbolism: Bong as part of the Republic of Liberia
the agricultural and traditional life of the county
